description_long: This is a classic chessboard set on a rectangular wooden base, featuring a checkered playing surface with alternating light and dark squares. The board is bordered by a thick, dark brown wooden frame that provides a sturdy and elegant appearance. On the board, two full sets of chess pieces are arranged in their starting positions, with one set in a natural wood tone and the other in a white finish. The chess pieces are detailed, with distinguishable shapes for each type, including pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings. The surface of the board is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall design is traditional, suitable for public parks, urban plazas, or recreational areas.
description: A traditional wooden chessboard with a checkered pattern and two full sets of detailed chess pieces, bordered by a dark wooden frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing both sets of chess pieces facing each other, with the brown pieces on the left and the white pieces on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alignment of the chess pieces, with the white pieces in the foreground and the brown pieces behind.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the white pieces on the left and the brown pieces on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the brown pieces in the foreground and the white pieces behind, emphasizing the symmetry of the setup.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a classic checkered pattern of alternating light and dark squares, arranged in a regular grid with sharp, clean edges. The squares are perfectly aligned, forming a uniform and symmetrical layout across the board. The border is a solid, dark wood frame that contrasts with the lighter and darker squares, providing a visually distinct edge to the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, dark brown wooden frame with a smooth finish, slightly raised above the playing surface. It is plain with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or decorative markings, emphasizing a classic and elegant look.
